query: SELECT p.id, p.name, c.name as categoria, p.images FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210001 AND p.images IS NOT NULL AND c.name IN ('Esfirras', 'Pizza', 'Macarrão', 'Oferta do dia', 'Novidades') ORDER BY c.sortOrder, p.sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, c.name as categoria, p.images FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210001 AND p.images IS NOT NULL AND c.name IN ('Esfirras', 'Pizza', 'Macarrão', 'Oferta do dia', 'Novidades') ORDER BY c.sortOrder, p.sortOrder;
